posts.author: Dor_appSolution (Dor)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to share that Multi Embed is now available on the monday marketplace. Multi Embed allows you to view all your embedded links in a single place.

Easily drag, drop, resize, and position them to create an all-in-one workflow powerhouse.

Here are just a few things you can embed with Multi Embed:

  • Google Calendar, Sheets, and Docs
  • Social media posts
  • YouTube videos
  • Figma designs
  • Canva creations
  • Dropbox
  • And more…

multi_embed_52000×1020 259 KB

When all your related embedded links are together, you get a bird’s-eye view of everything you need.
